owner_operator_stated: Site shows the practice operating as Floss Dental Care, part of Smile Brands, with dentists E. Ryann Maloney, DMD and Neeva Patel, DMD; no mention of Ann E. Mazzotti.
notes: SUCCESSOR CONFLICT: record entity is 'Ann E. Mazzotti, D.D.S., P.C.' but the address (18650 Dixie Hwy, Homewood, IL 60430) and exact phone (708) 798-4424 are both now used by Floss Dental Care, a Smile Brands DSO location, staffed by different dentists (Maloney, Patel). Mazzotti's old site drmazzdds.com is dead (connection refused), consistent with the practice having been sold/rebranded. Do not present this as Ann Mazzotti's current practice.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Alex Shore, DDS is listed as founder/owner of Signature Smile Arts, which matches the record's practice name (Signature Smile Arts, PC).
notes: Address (18114 Gottschalk Ave, Homewood, IL 60430) and phone (708) 799-5353 both confirmed on the practice's own site. Originally founded ~1990 by Dr. Mayer, now led by Dr. Alex Shore per web search results. Single-location practice, not identified as part of a DSO or multi-location group. No careers/hiring links found on contact page or homepage.

owner_operator_stated: Site identifies Dr. Lanette Disera as the practicing dentist/owner (practicing in Joliet since 1987); no mention of Amy Diaz anywhere on the site.
notes: SUCCESSOR CONFLICT: record entity is 'Diaz Amy DMD' but the exact address (4130 W Jefferson St, Joliet, IL 60431) and exact phone (815) 744-4333 belong to Lanette M. Disera, DDS, P.C. (drdisera.com), staffed by Lanette Disera DDS and Christine Dunham DDS. No usable trace of an 'Amy Diaz' at this address in search results. Vendor hint 'Diseradds.Net' points toward the same Disera entity, reinforcing that the named record entity is stale.

owner_operator_stated: Site describes Dr. David Streitz, DMD as a third-generation dentist continuing the practice founded by Thomas Streitz over 65 years ago in Joliet, consistent with the record entity 'Thomas J Streitz DDS PC'.
notes: Address (1711 Campbell St, Joliet, IL 60435) and phone (815) 725-6868 confirmed on the practice's own site. Streitz Dental Arts is a two-office family practice (this Joliet office plus a Plainfield, IL office at 24012 W Main St #102) operating under one brand founded by Thomas Streitz; not identified as part of a national DSO. No careers/hiring links found.

Vendor hint 'Cdsclinic.Com' is WRONG for this record: that site (Comprehensive Dental Specialists) lists address 2201 Glenwood Ave and phone (815) 744-1774 — a different street number and different phone than this record (2435 Glenwood Ave, (815) 725-0260) — so it does not corroborate. Third-party directories (Yelp, Yellow Pages, Vitals, WebMD, ADA) consistently associate the exact address+phone with 'Glenwood Dental Center' (Chandrakant K. Mehta, DDS and Sonal C. Mehta, DDS), but the practice's own apparent domain glenwooddentalcenter.com is dead (connection refused), and a Yelp listing (updated June 2025) marks the business CLOSED. A scmdentistry.com site also surfaced from the practice-name search but belongs to an unrelated Santa Ana, CA practice (South Coast Metro Center for Dentistry) and does not match this address/phone at all. No usable live website could be corroborated for this record.

owner_operator_stated: Site is Dr. Gabriella M. Paolucci's own practice page, name matches the record entity exactly.
notes: Address (1960 Essington Rd, Suite 105, Joliet, IL 60435) and phone (815) 436-8660 confirmed on the practice's own homepage. Only one dentist found on the site (record provider_count=2, but no second dentist named on the site); an /about page returned 404. No careers/hiring links found.
